message:
Add util/updater/tui-styles branch tests (5 functions improved)

- util: SanitizeFilename UTF-8 boundary tests
- updater: compareVersions 92.7%→97.6% (invalid/prerelease branches)
- tui/styles: TokensForWidth 83.3%→100% (UltraWide branch)
- tui/styles: AdaptiveCardDimensions 87.5%→93.8% (negative gap guard)
- tui/styles: ParseHex uppercase/mixed-case tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
